modules.sql: SELECT ifw_effective_date AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_overdraft_amount, SUM(fee_amount) AS total_fees, ifw_effective_date FROM overdraft_events GROUP BY ifw_effective_date UNION ALL SELECT 'WEEKLY_TOTAL' AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_overdraft_amount, SUM(fee_amount) AS total_fees, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM overdraft_events WHERE (SELECT strftime('%w', MAX(ifw_effective_date)) FROM overdraft_events) = '0'
